docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY DEFENDANT DISCOVER BANK
ORDER RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM(DEFENDANT) **GRANTED**
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $40) SERVED FEB-17-2022, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT DISCOVER BANK
DECLARATION RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY DEFENDANT DISCOVER BANK

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT DISCOVER BANK PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY EVIN CULP (CUSTODIAN RECORDS). DEFEDNANTS EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: A. DATT. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
ORDER CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $9,800.00 FILED BY CIUMAC, CRISTINA AS TO DEFENDANT DISCOVER BANK ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-21-2022 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
